results.title: Right Word | Mandate-Rejection Continuum: Cockroach Phase Of India’s Opposition Politics
results.description: After the 2014 mandate, the refusal took the form of doubt about Electronic Voting Machines. After the 2019 mandate, it became outright denial that the verdict was legitimate.
